gold.rationale: 样本文本把“热搜与博主转述/网传物料”包装成“耀客传媒官方公众号发布公告并披露完整项目细节”，但未给出任何可核验的官方来源与证据支撑，关键公告内容属于凭空编造。同时配图海报为AI生成物，且海报小字指向“数字人形象合作/虚拟代言人计划”，与正文描述的“签约AI演员并进组参演拍摄”在语义上不一致，整体结论不成立。

atoms: A vertical marketing poster with a futuristic, sci-fi aesthetic featuring a dark blue and silver color palette.
A female figure on the left with short black hair, wearing a silver metallic suit jacket with glowing blue accents.
A male figure on the right with black hair, wearing a dark grey jacket with glowing blue circuit-like lines.
A glowing blue holographic globe and digital network lines floating between the two figures.
Text at the top reads 'Y/>娱乐-YULE' and '官宣签约 AI演员' (Official Announcement: Signing AI Actors).
Text at the bottom reads '代号：#智耀计划#' (Code: #SmartShinePlan#) and '数字人形象合作 / 虚拟代言人计划' (Digital Human Cooperation / Virtual Ambassador Plan).
A date stamp '2026.03' is visible near the bottom center.
A copyright footer at the very bottom reads '© 2026 YULE ENTERTAINMENT MEDIA CO., LTD. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.'
The background depicts a high-tech corridor or server room with glowing blue lights and panels.
A medium close-up shot of a young East Asian man with short black hair looking directly at the camera.
The man is wearing a beige button-down shirt over a white t-shirt.
The background is a blurred indoor setting with a yellow sofa and a green plant visible.
A yellow subtitle at the bottom reads '大家好我是AI演员秦浩岳' (Hello everyone, I am AI actor Qin Haoyue).
A Weibo logo and handle '@花生小生花' are in the top right corner.
A watermark '@娱乐大呲花' is in the bottom right corner.

retrieved_evidence.text: 耀客传媒近年来以出品多部热门影视剧为业界熟知，近日网络上出现一份以“耀客传媒官宣签约AI演员”为主题的竖版宣传物料，引发关注。该物料上方展示了类似娱乐公司宣发常用的LOGO与标题，中部呈现两位所谓“AI演员”的半身形象，据相关讨论描述，女方气质与五官轮廓被认为接近赵今麦风格但并不完全一致，男方轮廓与翟子路相似但也存在区别，整体采用高质感商业设计排版，下方标注“2026.03”等日期和话题标签，被部分网友视作新剧项目与虚拟演员合作的暗示。

内娱正式进入AI演员时代。

耀客传媒正式官宣签约AI演员了，被指女像赵今麦，男像翟子路。话说，以后是不是很多演员要大受影响了？

#耀客签约AI演员# ​​​
#耀客官宣签约两位AI演员##耀客签约的AI演员撞脸多个明星# 如何评价耀客传媒签约的这两个演员、男的简直是翟子路翻版，女的融合了好多个女明星，赵今麦、代露娃、张子枫、田曦薇 ​​​
近日，内地社交平台微博上有关“耀客签约AI演员”的话题热度持续攀升，多条相关词条进入娱乐榜单前列。据多位认证娱乐博主在本周接连发帖介绍，一家影视制作公司被指与虚拟形象签约，引发网友围绕“撞脸赵今麦、翟子路”等话题展开讨论。评论区中，不少网民借此延伸谈及虚拟演员未来发展及对传统演艺行业的影响，相关讨论仍在平台上持续发酵。
记者注意到，本周在微博等社交平台传播的“AI演员”相关内容，主要源自多名娱乐博主发布的长文与配图解读，而非出自官方渠道的正式公告文本。据相关运营人士介绍，这些博主多通过截图、宣传照及个人理解进行二次整理，引导网友围绕合约背景、形象设计及与真人演员之间的对比展开讨论。由于目前公开资料有限，外界对该项目的具体合作方式与后续规划仍多依赖社交平台上的转述信息，相关情况有待进一步披露。
耀客签约AI演员，为何看到了内娱很多人的脸，莫名诡异[揣手] #耀客AI演员 赵今麦翟子路# ​​​

围绕这两位被指对标赵今麦与翟子路的“AI演员”，社交平台上出现了大量讨论与转发，据相关账号整理的互动记录显示，不少网友在评论区以“撞脸”“融合多位明星”等词语形容其外貌特征，并对耀客传媒是否真的启用此类虚拟形象替代真人演员展开争论。有用户从九宫格排布的多张素材中逐一比对，认为女方兼具多位年轻女星的神态，男方则吸收了多名流量艺人的特征，话题随即登上娱乐榜单，折射出业界与观众对AI角色介入影视制作的期待与忧虑。
围绕“AI演员”形象引发的容貌争议近日在社交平台上进一步发酵。据参与讨论的多名娱乐博主转述，部分网友认为，其中一位虚拟形象的外貌与演员赵今麦相似，另一位则被指与翟子路有一定程度“撞脸”。也有评论认为，女方形象更像是多位年轻女星特征的综合，被提及的包括赵今麦、代露娃、张子枫、田曦薇等。相关评价多集中在相貌风格与市场审美的相似性上，具体设计来源尚未有明确说明。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the core event and specific details found in the evidence but inflates the certainty of the 'official' announcement status and the timeline of the project rollout.
text_analysis.t2_evidence: Post claims '耀客传媒已官宣签约' (Yaoke Media has officially announced signing) and '随公告同步释出的官宣海报' (official poster released with the announcement), whereas evidence [4] explicitly states '主要源自多名娱乐博主发布的长文与配图解读，而非出自官方渠道的正式公告文本' (mainly from long-form posts and images by entertainment bloggers, not from official channel announcement texts) and notes '相关情况有待进一步披露' (details remain to be disclosed).
t2_problematic_subclaims: Claim that Yaoke Media officially announced the signing via a poster.
Claim that the first pilot project will enter group communication and test shooting phases 'recently' (近期).
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely factual regarding the event and specific details but misleadingly frames unverified social media speculation as an official corporate announcement.

images.scene_description: A high-fidelity digital poster featuring a male and female figure in futuristic, tech-wear clothing against a stylized blue background with digital interface elements.
images.ocr_text: Y/>娱乐-YULE | 官宣签约 AI演员 | OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT: SIGNING AI ACTORS | 代号：#智耀计划# | 数字人形象合作 / 虚拟代言人计划 | DIGITAL HUMAN COOPERATION / VIRTUAL AMBASSADOR PLAN | 2026.03 | © 2026 YULE ENTERTAINMENT MEDIA CO., LTD. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
images.v1_evidence: The image exhibits high-fidelity AI generation characteristics including 'plastic' skin texture, perfectly symmetrical and flawless facial features, and a stylized 'editorial poster' aesthetic that lacks the candid imperfections of a real photograph.
images.explanation: The image is a synthetic AI-generated poster matching the post's description of a promotional graphic for AI actors, rather than a candid news photo.

images.scene_description: A close-up shot of a young man speaking directly to the camera in a casual indoor setting, with a Weibo watermark visible in the corner.
images.ocr_text: weibo | @花生生生花 | 大家好我是AI演员秦凌岳 | @娱乐大呲花
images.c_evidence: The post text claims the image depicts the official announcement poster for 'YAO-AI01' and 'YAO-AI02', but the image shows a different person (identified in the caption as 'Qin Lingyue') speaking in a casual interview setting, not the stylized poster described.
images.explanation: While the image is a genuine-looking photo, it depicts a different specific entity (Qin Lingyue) than the one claimed by the post text (YAO-AI01), creating a semantic mismatch.

image_analysis.global_notes: The first image is a synthetic AI poster matching the post's description, while the second image is a genuine photo of a different person, creating a mismatch between the visual evidence and the post's specific claims about the subject.

judge.level3_rationale: 该文虚构了具体的签约合同细节与艺人代号，将社交网络上的猜测性讨论包装成官方确认消息，且配图包含明显的人工智能合成痕迹与非官方视频剪辑，导致受众误信不实核心信息。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post fabricates specific details (names, official status) and relies on AI-generated imagery, while the second image contradicts the text's claim about the actors' identities.
judge.core_claim: Yule Entertainment has officially announced the signing of two AI actors named 'YAO-AI01' and 'YAO-AI02' as part of the 'SmartShine Plan' project.
key_subclaims: Yule Entertainment officially announced the signing via a poster dated 2026.03.
The two AI actors are named YAO-AI01 and YAO-AI02.
The AI actors will participate in Yule's 2026 urban and historical drama projects.
The AI actors are visually similar to Zhao Jinmai and Zhai Zilu.
The poster features a futuristic design with glowing blue digital effects.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Yule Entertainment officially announced the signing via a poster dated 2026.03.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence suggests the poster is a marketing material circulating on social media, but the text claims it is an official announcement from the company's official account. The date 2026.03 is present in the image.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The two AI actors are named YAO-AI01 and YAO-AI02.
subclaim_findings.note: The post text claims these names, but the provided evidence and image do not explicitly display these specific names in the visible text.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The AI actors will participate in Yule's 2026 urban and historical drama projects.
subclaim_findings.note: The post text claims this, but the evidence states the project details are limited and rely on social media speculation.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The AI actors are visually similar to Zhao Jinmai and Zhai Zilu.
subclaim_findings.note: Social media posts and evidence confirm that the AI actors are widely perceived to resemble Zhao Jinmai and Zhai Zilu.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The poster features a futuristic design with glowing blue digital effects.
subclaim_findings.note: The image content confirms the futuristic aesthetic and visual style.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post contains fabricated details about the specific names of the AI actors and the official nature of the announcement, while the image is AI-generated (V1) and the second image contradicts the text's claim about the actors' identities (C1). The core claim is misleading due to these fabrications and visual inconsistencies.

image_findings.explanation: The image exhibits high-fidelity AI generation characteristics (plastic skin, uncanny lighting) consistent with V1, and the text claims it is an official announcement while evidence suggests it is a marketing material circulating online.

The image shows a man introducing himself as 'AI actor Qin Haoyue', but the post text refers to the AI actors as 'YAO-AI01' and 'YAO-AI02', creating a semantic mismatch regarding the identity of the AI actors.
